description: Composition Olive green trousers made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides, two patch pockets at the back, stitch detailing, belt loops on waistband and a zipped and button closure on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Crafted from soft cotton and designed with a cut that offers a flattering silhouette, this pair of chinos from highlander makes a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair it with semi-formal shirts, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
